steps.title: Clarify the two functions
steps.content: The first sentence states that Fluc can produce bioluminescence and can also act as an ACS enzyme. The next sentence explains the significance of that dual role: Fluc indicates light-emitting ability, but ACS alone does not.

steps.title: Use an explanatory transition
steps.content: Choice A signals contrast, Choice B adds emphasis, and Choice C adds another point. The remaining transition means 'in other words,' which fits a sentence that clarifies what Fluc's two functions imply. The answer is D.
